title: Senior Software Engineer, AI Assisted Engineering Support
description:
About the Role

We believe that Software Engineering is the highest-leverage
human workflow in the company. In an AI-native world, the
bottleneck is no longer how fast we can type, but how
quickly we can validate, iterate, and deploy. Engineering
excellence is our ultimate competitive advantage. As a
Senior Software Engineer for AI Assisted Engineering
Support, you will build the "intelligence layer" for our
development teams. You aren't just building tools; you are
building agents that understand our codebase, our standards,
and our intent. Your goal is to move the company toward a
"Demo to Prod" reality where AI handles the boilerplate, the
testing, and the initial PR generation, leaving humans to
focus on architecture and high-level logic.

Consistent with our "Human Centric Workflows" philosophy,
you will treat LLMs as programmable functions grounded in
our specific codebase. You will build the specialized
assistants that integrate into our IDEs and CI/CD pipelines
to unblock developers, automate reviews, and ensure that
"gold-standard" code is the default, not the exception.

What you'll do

- Build AI Engineering Assistants: Develop and scale the
  internal agents that assist with code generation,
  automated refactoring, and documentation.
- Enable the "Demo to Prod" Pipeline: Work on the technical
  implementation of tools that allow for one-shot
  workflows—moving from a prototype or a spec directly to a
  production-ready Pull Request.
- Deterministic Engineering Evals: Drive quality by
  prioritizing determinism. You will build the serialization
  formats and retrieval systems (RAG) that give engineering
  agents the exact context they need from our repositories
  to be precise and useful.
- Automated Code Stewardship: Create agents that help maintain
  our "Immune System"—automated drift detection, visual
  regression testing, and security scanning for AI-assisted
  contributions.
- Systemic Optimization: Implement a culture of rigour. You
  will run experiments across different models and tools,
  using engineering-specific benchmarks to ensure our
  assistants are actually increasing velocity and quality.
- Global Collaboration: Partner with the US and Israel-based
  teams to integrate your assistants into our global
  developer platform and telemetry frameworks.

What we're looking for

- The "Developer's Developer": You are a Senior Software
  Engineer who loves building tools for other engineers. You
  understand the pain points of the modern development
  lifecycle and want to solve them with AI.
- An Agentic Systems Specialist: You are experienced in
  building agentic flows (using state machines or agent
  frameworks) and know how to balance agency (allowing the
  tool to solve the problem) with precision (ensuring it
  doesn't break prod).
- The "Data-First" Builder: You recognize that an AI assistant
  is only as good as the context it receives. You are
  skilled at data engineering and know how to serialize
  complex codebases for LLM consumption.
- The "Moat" Builder: You see engineering velocity as a
  strategic differentiator. You are driven by the goal of
  making our engineering org so fast and reliable that we
  out-innovate the market.

This is a high-impact implementation role. You will be
shipping code that your teammates use every single day.
You’ll spend your time building IDE extensions, automating
PR cycles, and ensuring that our AI-native operating model
delivers a level of engineering speed that is fundamentally
unreachable by traditional teams.
responsibilities: Build and scale internal AI engineering assistants for code generation, automated refactoring, and documentation
Implement technical tools for one-shot workflows moving from prototype to production-ready Pull Requests
Develop serialization formats and RAG retrieval systems to provide engineering agents with precise codebase context
Create automated agents for drift detection, visual regression testing, and security scanning
Run experiments across different models using engineering-specific benchmarks to optimize assistant performance
Partner with global teams to integrate AI assistants into developer platforms and telemetry frameworks
use_cases: AI-powered code generation and automated refactoring
One-shot prototype to production-ready PR workflows
Codebase drift detection and security scanning
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves building AI agents and assistants that
understand codebases, implementing RAG systems for
engineering context, and developing agentic workflows using
state machines and agent frameworks. The position directly
works on LLM-powered systems for code generation, automated
refactoring, and intelligent development tools.
